zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida Clinton於1320年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton21歲，母親Margery Corbet16歲。她於1336年6月6日與John, the Younger le Strange在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1360年在英國英格蘭享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida Clinton于1320年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton21岁，母亲Margery Corbet16岁。她于1336年6月6日与John, the Younger le Strange在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1360年在英国英格兰享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ida Clinton was born in 1320, in Warwickshire, England, her father, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, was 21 and her mother, Margery Corbet, was 16. She married John, the Younger le Strange on 6 June 1336, in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1360, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida Clinton est née en 1320, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margery Corbet, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John, the Younger le Strange le 6 juin 1336, à Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1360, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida Clinton 1320 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton 21 und ihre Mutter Margery Corbet 16. Sie hat am 6. Juni 1336 in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom John, the Younger le Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1360 im Alter von 41 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Clinton è nata il nel 1320 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Margery Corbet, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato John, the Younger le Strange il 6 giugno 1336, nel Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1360, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida Clintonが1320年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clintonは21歳，母Margery Corbetは16歳であった。1336年6月6日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストクでJohn, the Younger le Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1360年にイギリスイギリスで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida Clinton(이)가 1320년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Corbet(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1336년 6월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 맥스스토크에서 John, the Younger le Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Clinton nasceu em 1320, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margery Corbet, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John, the Younger le Strange em 6 de junho de 1336, em Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1360, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida Clinton родилась в 1320 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Corbet, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John, the Younger le Strange 6 июня 1336 г. в местности макссток, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1360 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
